<!--
Thanks for contributing to relic.

Keep PRs small and focused. If this is a large change, open an issue first
so we can agree on scope before you write code.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this change and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behaviour)
- [ ] Docs / chore / refactor (no behaviour change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `uv run ruff check relic tests` and `uv run ruff format relic tests`
- [ ] I ran `uv run pytest` and all tests pass locally
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] I updated `README.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] If this touches MCP tool descriptions or `RELIC_INSTRUCTIONS`, the
      `tests/test_token_budget.py` budgets still pass

## Screenshots / output

<!-- Optional: paste CLI output, screenshots, or `relic audit` numbers if relevant. -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
